product_context.persona: A new or returning podcast listener completing a core Pod0 job on iPhone.
platform_expectations: iPhone-first flow uses system navigation/chrome, safe areas, SF typography, semantic color, 44 pt tap targets, and reachable primary controls.
Accessibility evidence covers VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, contrast, motion/transparency settings, and touch target behavior before UI scores can pass.
Provider, relay, transcript, audio, or LLM dependencies are deterministic through fixtures/cassettes or explicitly marked live-only.
State, navigation, queue, playback, and generated report pages are checked across device, viewport, and resume contexts.
product_context.user_value: The flow should make settings and storage feel reliable, understandable, and native to Pod0 rather than a test-only path.

template_impact: Mobile App UI/UX Design drives user-goal framing, thumb-zone/reachability checks, visual hierarchy, 8-point spacing, empty/loading/error/success state coverage, and peak-end flow judgment.
iOS Liquid Glass drives hierarchy/harmony/consistency checks, control-layer restraint, GlassEffect composition, semantic foreground styles, and Reduce Motion/Transparency requirements.
Web Interface Guidelines drive generated-site accessibility, semantic HTML, focus, image metadata, safe-area, touch, reduced-motion, content-overflow, localization, and frontend performance checks.
Playwright CLI is the expected local verification path for generated GitHub Pages screenshots, snapshots, responsive viewports, and interaction smoke tests.
The generated page separates scenario facts, evidence, individual dimensions, grouped product judgment, risk, and confidence so isolated passes cannot hide a weak product flow.

scenario.title: Player uses new values and settings persist

accessibility_dynamic_type.summary: Not assessed. Requires VoiceOver/UI tree labels, Dynamic Type, contrast, Reduce Motion/Transparency, and touch target evidence.

notes: Attach step-by-step observed behavior before changing this verdict.
actual_result.summary: Player settings exposes Default Speed, Skip Back, Skip Forward, Double-Tap, Triple-Tap, Auto-mark, Auto-play-next, and footer copy. Auto-mark persisted off after leaving and re-entering Player.

analytics_privacy_boundaries.summary: Not assessed. Confirm useful event boundaries without PII, private keys, raw transcripts/audio, or provider secrets.

artifacts.summary: Attached three current screenshots, a semantic UI-tree excerpt, and shared log references.

attempted_test.summary: Executed SET-001 locally through Settings -> Player. Captured baseline controls, Auto-mark toggle off, and persistence after navigation away/back.

before_after_deltas.summary: Current evidence must be read as before/action/after deltas across the flow steps; any missing pair remains listed in instrumentation gaps.

content_hierarchy.summary: Not assessed. Verify podcast/show/episode/transcript/agent content outranks chrome and does not truncate critical meaning.

controls_gestures_audio.summary: Not assessed. Review must check buttons, menus, sheets, gestures, audio route controls, haptics, keyboard alternatives, and one-handed reach.

cross_screen_continuity.summary: Not assessed. Capture before/after navigation state for adjacent surfaces and ensure mini-player, queue, transcript, agent, and settings remain coherent.

data_integrity_state_sync.summary: Not assessed. Verify persisted state, Rust projections, Swift render state, queue/download/transcript/index data, and exported/imported records agree before and after the user-visible action.

defects_issues_filed.summary: No defects have been observed yet because the scenario has not run. Any actionable defect found later must link a GitHub issue before the page can leave incomplete.

device_os_matrix.summary: No device/OS matrix has run. The first validation should record simulator/device, OS, locale, appearance, Dynamic Type, and network state.

device_viewport_coverage.summary: Not assessed. Record iPhone size class, Dynamic Type, orientation when relevant, and generated GitHub Pages desktop/mobile viewport checks for the published report page.

error_recovery_behavior.summary: Not assessed. Error, offline, retry, cancellation, and recovery paths must be captured where the scenario can fail.

evidence_confidence.summary: Evidence confidence is zero until a current build, device/OS, rerun count, freshness, and flake notes are attached.

evidence_provenance.summary: 6 non-catalog artifact(s) are attached with their published IDs, paths, redaction metadata, and run context.

execution_attempts.summary: No attempts, retries, or branch executions have run. The page reserves structured attempt records for manual, simulator, CI, and replay executions.

expected_behavior.summary: Expected behavior from BDD: player uses new values and settings persist. NMP/RMP boundary declared by the catalog: D4.

flow.summary: Catalog flow for Settings And Storage: Given playback settings are opened, when skip intervals change, then player uses new values and settings persist.

information_architecture.summary: Not assessed. Confirm the user knows location, current mode, and next action from titles, tabs, bars, breadcrumbs, and hierarchy.

instrumentation_gaps.summary: Screenshots, UI trees, logs, metrics, cassettes, and accessibility audits are listed as explicit missing evidence so gaps cannot be hidden in prose.

liquid_glass_ios_primitives.summary: Not assessed. Requires evidence that iOS primitives and glass-like materials are used as functional chrome, with accessibility fallbacks.

localization_content_quality.summary: Not assessed. Review must check locale-sensitive strings, podcast metadata, transcript/agent content, truncation, empty/error copy, and translation safety.

media_session_background_continuity.summary: Not assessed. For podcast-facing flows, verify audio session route, mini-player/full-player continuity, queue state, lock-screen/background behavior, interruptions, and remote commands or mark them N/A with rationale.

motion_haptics.summary: Not assessed. Record transition, haptic, and Reduce Motion behavior when motion is part of the flow.

navigation_state_restoration.summary: Not assessed. Capture tab, sheet, detail path, back stack, deep-link, and relaunch restoration state so navigation success cannot hide stale or contradictory product state.

next_actions.summary: Run the scenario, attach evidence, score every dimension, file defects, and republish this page from validated JSON.

nmp_architecture_cohesiveness.summary: Not assessed. Declared NMP/RMP boundary: D4. Review must check Rust-owned state/policy, thin native renderers, bounded FFI, replay clocks, and privacy fail-closed behavior.

observability.summary: Not assessed. Attach structured logs, metric IDs, provider/request IDs, relay IDs, and redacted traces needed to diagnose failures.

offline_resume_behavior.summary: Not assessed. Offline, interruption, relaunch, background playback, cancellation, retry, and resume behavior must be captured where applicable.

notes: Remaining missing evidence: picker-change-coverage, relaunch-persistence, accessibility_audit.
Related scenario cluster coherence remains incomplete until adjacent pages are reviewed together.
owner_status.summary: Readiness gates, instrumentation gaps, risks, issues, and next actions carry owner/status fields for follow-through.

performance_metrics.summary: Player settings snapshots each contain 220 nodes and were captured without visible loading delay.

persona_job_acceptance.summary: Persona: A new or returning podcast listener completing a core Pod0 job on iPhone. Acceptance criteria are the scenario Given/When/Then plus the declared architecture boundary D4.

privacy_security.summary: Not assessed. Validation must scan screenshots, logs, cassettes, relays, and exports for leaked keys, tokens, private audio, or private Nostr material.

notes: Review adjacent scenario pages as a cluster before promoting group coherence.

readiness_gates.summary: Ship gate is incomplete; gates now reflect attached evidence, remaining missing evidence, linked defects, and cluster-level follow-up.

regression_risk.summary: Not assessed. Validation must list adjacent scenarios and modules to rerun after any fix.

reliability_flakiness.summary: Not assessed. Validation must record rerun count, retry causes, flake history, stale-build risk, timeout behavior, and deterministic replay coverage.

replayability_cassette_provenance.summary: Not assessed. Declared dependencies: settings seed. Provider, relay, STT, TTS, LLM, and network behavior must use replay cassettes or explain live-only evidence.

revalidation_status.summary: 0 fixed issue(s) and 0 open issue(s) are linked; fixed issues require revalidation run IDs before closure is considered proven.

review_skill_grounding.summary: Review must be grounded in loaded skills, not generic taste. Selected grounding covers Liquid Glass/iOS primitives, generated-site accessibility and interaction guidelines, and Playwright-based page verification.

risks_follow_up.summary: Current risks are scaffolded from missing evidence and cluster regression exposure. Actionable defects must gain issue/PR links and revalidation run IDs.

scenario_setup.summary: Declared setup dependencies: settings seed. Provider mode is none until validation attaches fixtures or cassettes.

sister_app_nmp_chirp_comparison.summary: Not assessed. Review must compare applicable NMP doctrine and known Chirp/sister-app fixes before marking this flow cohesive.

states_resilience.summary: Not assessed. Capture empty, loading, denied, unavailable, offline, retry, and recovery states reached by this scenario.

touch_ergonomics.summary: Not assessed. Audit primary controls for reachability, 44x44 pt targets, spacing, and gesture alternatives.

ui_polish_report.summary: Settings rows are grouped clearly with explanatory copy and stable switch labels.

ux_polish_report.summary: The toggle interaction gives immediate feedback and persists across navigation; picker and relaunch workflows remain untested.

verdict.summary: Evidence-backed incomplete: settings route and one persistence path are captured, but SET-001 skip-change and player-propagation acceptance coverage is missing.
